staticText: Route users to the private crypto mining operating margin worksheet without requesting, prefilling or transmitting their pool output, price, power, uptime, tariff, costs or hardware value. It performs bounded browser arithmetic from user-entered evidence only. It has no live price, foreign-exchange conversion, network difficulty, country preset, prediction, ROI, buy-versus-mine recommendation, account requirement or API. Never invent mining evidence or claim that simple hardware payback predicts future performance.
